label: Pool Heating
info:
Vytapeni bazenu v letnim rezimu (§11).
Patrony -> nadrz -> ventil -> vymenik bazenu NEBO NIBE -> vymenik primo.
B2: patrony + ventil + filtrace lock + topeni_mod sync.
B3: NIBE→bazen (4 use cases + planovac).
